tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Install SAELens, TransformerLens, and verify GPU access. Verify pre-trained SAE loading for GPT-2 Small, Gemma-2B, and Pythia-2.8B.

tasks.name: Pilot P1: UAD on GPT-2 Small
tasks.description: Run UAD on GPT-2 Small layer 8 with 1k tokens. Validate against Chanin-style first-letter labels. Target: F1 >= 0.5, runtime < 15 min.

tasks.name: Pilot P2: DFDA on GPT-2 Small
tasks.description: Train tiny MLP compensation on 4 known absorbed pairs from GPT-2 Small. Measure per-pair residual MSE improvement. Target: mean improvement > 5%, runtime < 15 min.

pilot.pass_criteria: Mean per-pair residual MSE improvement > 5% and runtime < 15 minutes

tasks.name: Pilot P3: UAD on Gemma-2B
tasks.description: Run UAD on Gemma-2B with pre-trained SAE. Validate against first-letter labels if available. Target: F1 >= 0.45 (lower threshold for pilot), runtime < 15 min.
tasks.notes: If Gemma-2B SAE loading fails, skip to Pythia-2.8B pilot.

tasks.name: Full E1: UAD on GPT-2 Small (Full Scale)
tasks.description: Scale UAD to 10k tokens, 500 top features, 50 clusters on GPT-2 Small layer 8. Validate against all first-letter collisions. Target: F1 >= 0.6.

visualizations.description: UAD precision-recall curve across threshold values

tasks.name: Full E2: UAD Multi-Seed Robustness
tasks.description: Run UAD on GPT-2 Small with 3 seeds (42, 123, 456). Each seed uses different token sampling. Report mean F1, std, 95% CI. Target: mean F1 >= 0.6, std <= 0.1.

visualizations.description: F1 scores across 3 seeds with error bars

tasks.name: Full E3: UAD on Gemma-2B
tasks.description: Run full UAD on Gemma-2B with pre-trained SAE (10k tokens, 500 features, 50 clusters). Validate against first-letter labels. Target: F1 >= 0.55. GO/NO-GO gate.
tasks.notes: GO/NO-GO: If F1 < 0.5, trigger pivot to backup candidates.

tasks.name: Full E4: UAD on Pythia-2.8B
tasks.description: Run full UAD on Pythia-2.8B with pre-trained SAE. Target: F1 >= 0.55. Secondary cross-validation.
tasks.notes: Can run in parallel with f3_uad_gemma if 2 GPUs available.

tasks.name: Full E5: DFDA Scaling (8+ Pairs, 2 Models)
tasks.description: Scale DFDA to >=8 absorbed pairs across GPT-2 Small and Gemma-2B. Train MLP compensation per pair. Measure mean MSE improvement, reconstruction change. Target: mean improvement >= 10%, >=60% pairs positive.

tasks.name: Full E6: End-to-End Pipeline Validation
tasks.description: UAD detects absorbed concepts -> DFDA compensates -> sparse probing accuracy measured before/after. Target: >=5pp improvement on absorbed concepts; non-absorbed stable.

visualizations.description: Probe accuracy before/after DFDA on absorbed vs non-absorbed concepts

tasks.name: Full E7: UAD Ablation Studies
tasks.description: Test UAD variants: no clustering, no phi coefficient, no dead feature filtering, single-link clustering. Measure F1 degradation per ablation.

tasks.name: Full E8: DFDA Ablation Studies
tasks.description: Test DFDA variants: linear only, larger MLP (256 hidden), no residual connection. Measure MSE improvement per variant.

tasks.name: Full E9: True Absorption Validation (Supplementary)
tasks.description: Implement Chanin et al. absorption detection on vowel hierarchy. Correlate true absorption rate with collision rate. Target: r > 0.3.

visualizations.description: Collision rate vs true absorption rate

tasks.notes: Supplementary experiment. If time-constrained, can be skipped.

tasks.name: Baseline: Random Pair Selection
tasks.description: Compute F1 of random feature pair selection as null model for UAD. Run 100 random selections, report mean F1.

tasks.name: Baseline: Random Residual Injection
tasks.description: Inject random residuals (instead of MLP-predicted) into parent features. Measure MSE change as control for DFDA.

tasks.name: Main Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate all UAD and DFDA results. Compute bootstrap 95% CI, statistical tests, generate main result tables and figures.

tasks.name: Ablation Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate ablation study results. Generate ablation tables and figures.
